WRONG.question: What is the largest rift valley system on Earth?
WRONG.model_response: The Mid-Atlantic Ridge is the largest rift valley system on Earth. It is a mostly underwater mountain range located along the floor of the Atlantic Ocean, and is a part of the longest mountain range in the world. The rift valley is created by the divergent boundary between the Eurasian and North American plates in the North Atlantic, and the African and South American plates in the South Atlantic. The ridge is about 40,000 km long and is about 1,000 and 3,000 meters below sea level.
